places.name: Ouray Alchemist
places.description: A recreation of an Old West apothecary full of curios.

places.name: Box Canyon Falls
places.description: A glimpse of a waterfall is reached by a steel catwalk along a slot canyon located in an Ouray city park.

places.name: Cascade Falls Park
places.description: Let Ouray’s tallest waterfall sweep your breath away on a dealer’s choice of scenic hikes.
